import ScrollAnimation from 'react-animate-on-scroll'; import React from "react"; import styled, { keyframes } from 'styled-components'; import LanguageList from "./LanguageList"; import "grid-css/grid.min.css"; import { slideInLeft, slideInRight } from 'react-animations'; const AboutMe = () => { const SlideInLeft = styled.div`animation: 2s ${keyframes`${slideInLeft}`} infinite `; const SlideInLeftOnce = styled.div`animation: 2s ${keyframes`${slideInLeft}`} 1 `; const SlideInRight = styled.div`animation: 2s ${keyframes`${slideInRight}`} infinite `; return(

) }; export default AboutMe;
